mapper.insert: insert into stk_lv_io_inhospital_barcode( id, tenant_id, io_direction, stk_io_bill_id, stk_io_bill_no, stk_io_bill_type, stk_io_bill_entry_id, warehouse_id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, department_id, department_code, department_name, material_id, material_code, material_name, material_speci, material_model, material_unit_name, factory_id, factory_name, supplier_id, supplier_name, batch_no, batch_number, begin_time, end_time, unit_price, qty_in_package, package_index, package_total, in_hospital_code, fixed_package_barcode, stk_inventory_id, stk_dep_inventory_id, hc_barcode_master_id, audit_by, audit_time, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{id}, #{tenantId}, #{ioDirection}, #{stkIoBillId}, #{stkIoBillNo}, #{stkIoBillType}, #{stkIoBillEntryId}, #{warehouseId}, #{warehouseCode}, #{warehouseName}, #{departmentId}, #{departmentCode}, #{departmentName}, #{materialId}, #{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{materialSpeci}, #{materialModel}, #{materialUnitName}, #{factoryId}, #{factoryName}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, #{batchNo}, #{batchNumber}, #{beginTime}, #{endTime}, #{unitPrice}, #{qtyInPackage}, #{packageIndex}, #{packageTotal}, #{inHospitalCode}, #{fixedPackageBarcode}, #{stkInventoryId}, #{stkDepInventoryId}, #{hcBarcodeMasterId}, #{auditBy}, #{auditTime}, #{remark}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )
mapper.update: update hc_barcode_master set current_holder_type = #{currentHolderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, current_warehouse_id = #{currentWarehouseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, current_department_id = #{currentDepartmentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{tenantId} and del_flag = 0
mapper.insert: insert into hc_barcode_master( id, tenant_id, barcode_value, value_level, business_type_code, business_type_name, source_table, source_row_id, bill_domain, bill_id, bill_no, bill_type, bill_entry_id, material_id, material_code, material_name, material_speci, material_model, material_unit_name, factory_id, factory_name, supplier_id, supplier_name, warehouse_id, warehouse_name, department_id, department_name, batch_no, batch_number, begin_time, end_time, master_barcode, secondary_barcode, fixed_package_qty, current_holder_type, current_warehouse_id, current_department_id, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{id}, #{tenantId}, #{barcodeValue}, #{valueLevel}, #{businessTypeCode}, #{businessTypeName}, #{sourceTable}, #{sourceRowId}, #{billDomain}, #{billId}, #{billNo}, #{billType}, #{billEntryId}, #{materialId}, #{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{materialSpeci}, #{materialModel}, #{materialUnitName}, #{factoryId}, #{factoryName}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, #{warehouseId}, #{warehouseName}, #{departmentId}, #{departmentName}, #{batchNo}, #{batchNumber}, #{beginTime}, #{endTime}, #{masterBarcode}, #{secondaryBarcode}, #{fixedPackageQty}, #{currentHolderType}, #{currentWarehouseId}, #{currentDepartmentId}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )

insert into hc_barcode_flow( id, tenant_id, hc_barcode_master_id, barcode_value, value_level, seq_no, event_code, event_name, event_time, bill_domain, bill_id, bill_no, bill_entry_id, from_warehouse_id, to_warehouse_id, from_department_id, to_department_id, qty, material_name, material_speci, material_model, operator_id, operator_name, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{id}, #{tenantId}, #{hcBarcodeMasterId}, #{barcodeValue}, #{valueLevel}, #{seqNo}, #{eventCode}, #{eventName}, #{eventTime}, #{billDomain}, #{billId}, #{billNo}, #{billEntryId}, #{fromWarehouseId}, #{toWarehouseId}, #{fromDepartmentId}, #{toDepartmentId}, #{qty}, #{materialName}, #{materialSpeci}, #{materialModel}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{remark}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )

insert into gz_wh_flow( id, tenant_id, bill_id, bill_no, entry_id, ref_bill_id, ref_entry_id, warehouse_id, warehouse_name, material_id, material_code, material_name, material_speci, material_model, batch_no, batch_number, batch_id, qty, unit_price, amt, begin_time, end_time, supplier_id, supplier_name, factory_id, factory_name, gz_depot_inventory_id, in_hospital_code, master_barcode, secondary_barcode, lx, flow_time, origin_business_type, del_flag, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{id}, #{tenantId}, #{billId}, #{billNo}, #{entryId}, #{refBillId}, #{refEntryId}, #{warehouseId}, #{warehouseName}, #{materialId}, #{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{materialSpeci}, #{materialModel}, #{batchNo}, #{batchNumber}, #{batchId}, #{qty}, #{unitPrice}, #{amt}, #{beginTime}, #{endTime}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, #{factoryId}, #{factoryName}, #{gzDepotInventoryId}, #{inHospitalCode}, #{masterBarcode}, #{secondaryBarcode}, #{lx}, #{flowTime}, #{originBusinessType}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )

insert into gz_dep_flow( id, tenant_id, bill_id, bill_no, entry_id, department_id, department_name, warehouse_id, warehouse_name, material_id, material_code, material_name, material_speci, material_model, batch_no, batch_number, batch_id, qty, unit_price, amt, begin_time, end_time, supplier_id, supplier_name, factory_id, factory_name, gz_dep_inventory_id, in_hospital_code, master_barcode, secondary_barcode, lx, flow_time, origin_business_type, del_flag, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{id}, #{tenantId}, #{billId}, #{billNo}, #{entryId}, #{departmentId}, #{departmentName}, #{warehouseId}, #{warehouseName}, #{materialId}, #{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{materialSpeci}, #{materialModel}, #{batchNo}, #{batchNumber}, #{batchId}, #{qty}, #{unitPrice}, #{amt}, #{beginTime}, #{endTime}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, #{factoryId}, #{factoryName}, #{gzDepInventoryId}, #{inHospitalCode}, #{masterBarcode}, #{secondaryBarcode}, #{lx}, #{flowTime}, #{originBusinessType}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )
